CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, datetime_str String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT id, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(datetime_str, 3, 'UTC') AS datetime64_value FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, datetime_str, datetime64_value FROM test_results WHERE datetime64_value >= '2023-01-01 00:00:00' AND datetime64_value <= '2023-12-31 23:59:59';
SELECT id, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(datetime_str, 6, 'Asia/Tokyo') AS datetime64_value FROM test_dates ORDER BY datetime64_value DESC LIMIT 2;

WITH (SELECT min(datetime_str) FROM test_dates) AS min_date, (SELECT max(datetime_str) FROM test_dates) AS max_date SELECT YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(min_date, 3) AS min_datetime64, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(max_date, 3) AS max_datetime64;
SELECT id, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(datetime_str, 0, 'America/New_York') AS datetime64_value FROM test_dates WHERE datetime_str LIKE '2023%';
CREATE TABLE nested_example AS SELECT id, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(datetime_str, 6) AS datetime64_value FROM (SELECT id, datetime_str FROM test_dates WHERE id < 3) AS filtered_dates;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_records, AVG(datetime64_value) AS avg_datetime64 FROM (SELECT YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime64(datetime_str, 4) AS datetime64_value FROM test_dates) GROUP BY (toStartOfMonth(datetime64_value));
